channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge orders release of more redacted Epstein files names
item.description: A federal judge in Washington ordered the Justice Department to release information that was redacted or withheld from the public Epstein files.

item.title: Bernie Moreno's leftward shift
item.description: The Ohio Republican joined Elizabeth Warren to propose one of the largest tax increases in U.S. history, breaking his anti-tax pledge.

item.title: Ultimate guide to patriotic merch for a star-spangled semiquincentennial
item.description: For patriotic paraphernalia to keep the party going, we present the second ultimate semiquincentennial merch guide.

item.title: Toy Story 5 vs. Drunken Noodles
item.description: Disney versus desire in two fantasy films.
